[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111100101 6
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000110000 2
5 001000000 1
6 100100001 3
7 011000000 2

70 07 100100000 2

13 31 011000000 2 match 7
